info.title: Financial Datasets API — Analyst Estimates
info.description: Consensus Wall Street analyst estimates (estimated revenue + estimated earnings per share) for US stock tickers, broken down by fiscal period (annual or quarterly). Proxied through AIsa from the Financial Datasets API.

x-doc.desc_en: List of analyst estimate records, one per fiscal period, ordered from most recent.
x-doc.title_zh: 分析师预估记录列表,每个财报周期一条,按时间从近到远排列。

fiscal_period.description: The fiscal period of the analyst estimate.

x-doc.desc_en: The fiscal period the estimate applies to, expressed as the period's date. Combine it with `period` to know whether it denotes a fiscal year or a fiscal quarter.
x-doc.title_zh: 该预估对应的财报周期,以周期日期表示。结合 `period` 可判断它代表的是某个财年还是财季。

period.description: The period of the analyst estimate.

x-doc.desc_en: Whether this record is an annual or a quarterly estimate, matching the requested granularity.
x-doc.title_zh: 本条记录是年度还是季度预估,与请求的粒度一致。

x-doc.desc_en:
Consensus estimated total revenue for the fiscal period, in the company's reporting currency.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明金额单位(整额或千/百万),待研发确认。]
x-doc.title_zh:
该财报周期的一致预期总营收,以公司报告币种计。
[⚠️批注:源码未声明金额单位(整额或千/百万),待研发确认。]

x-doc.desc_en: Consensus estimated earnings per share (EPS) for the fiscal period, in the company's reporting currency.
x-doc.title_zh: 该财报周期的一致预期每股收益(EPS),以公司报告币种计。

NotFoundError.description: The specified resource was not found

PaymentRequiredError.description: The request requires a paid subscription

example.message: This endpoint requires a paid subscription. Please upgrade your plan.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker to get analyst estimates for.

x-doc.desc_en: Stock ticker symbol of the US-listed company to pull analyst estimates for, e.g. `AAPL`. One ticker per request.
x-doc.title_zh: 要查询分析师预估的美股股票代码,如 `AAPL`。每次请求一只。

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The period to get analyst estimates for. Use the /analyst-estimates/periods endpoint to get a list of available periods. Defaults to 'annual'.

x-doc.desc_en: Fiscal granularity of the estimates: `annual` for full-year projections, `quarterly` for per-quarter ones. The list of valid periods can be checked via the `/analyst-estimates/periods` endpoint.
x-doc.title_zh: 预估的财报粒度:`annual` 为整年预测,`quarterly` 为分季度预测。可用周期可通过 `/analyst-estimates/periods` 接口查询。

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of estimates to return (max 3 for annual, 12 for quarterly).

x-doc.desc_en: Caps how many of the most recent estimate periods are returned. The accepted ceiling depends on granularity — up to 3 for annual and 12 for quarterly. Higher values are clamped to that ceiling.
x-doc.title_zh: 限定返回最近多少个预估周期。上限随粒度而定 —— 年度最多 3 个、季度最多 12 个;超出会被截到上限。

x-doc.desc_en: Return consensus Wall Street analyst estimates — projected revenue and earnings per share — for a single US stock ticker, broken down by fiscal period. This is a read-only query: pick annual or quarterly granularity and cap how many periods come back. Typical uses are valuation models, earnings previews, and comparison against actuals.
x-doc.description_zh: 返回单只美股的华尔街分析师一致预期 —— 预估营收与每股收益 —— 并按财报周期拆分。这是只读查询:可选年度或季度粒度,并限定返回的周期数量。典型场景为估值建模、财报前瞻,以及与实际值对比。
x-doc.resp_section_intro: 成功时返回该 ticker 的分析师预估列表,按所选周期粒度组织。

errors.message_zh: 请求参数无效,例如漏传必填的 `ticker` 或取值非法。
鉴权失败,Bearer API Key 缺失或无效。
该接口需要付费订阅,当前套餐无权访问,需升级套餐。

x-doc.errors_source: spec 已声明 400/401/402/404,错误体为 ErrorResponse(error + message)
